title: The Decisive King Minh Mang
summary: The second King of the Nguyen Dynasty, famous for his hard work, important administrative reforms, and love for poetry and literature.

slides.text: Hey kids! Do you know who King Gia Long's son was? That was King Minh Mang - an extremely smart and hardworking person.
slides.imagePrompt: King Minh Mang sitting at a desk late at night, many scrolls around him, a single candle, looking determined, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He divided our country into 31 provinces to make it easier to manage. This was a very smart way of geographic division that we still learn from today.
slides.imagePrompt: A large wooden map of Vietnam with 31 colorful pieces, King Minh Mang pointing at it with a wand, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: King Minh Mang loved poetry and literature. He built Quoc Tu Giam in Hue to encourage scholars to study and develop their talents.
slides.imagePrompt: Minh Mang Reading a poem in a beautiful garden, scholarly atmosphere, scholars around, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: During his reign, the Nguyen court was very strong. However, he was also very strict and always worried about outside influences.
slides.imagePrompt: The majestic face of Minh Mang, crown with pearls, background of a strong citadel, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: How many provinces did King Minh Mang divide our country into?
King Minh Mang was which King of the Nguyen Dynasty?
